steps.title: Define variable and express each type
steps.content: Let $n$ be the number of 7‑inch screws made. Then the number of 9‑inch screws is $5n$ (since it is 5 times $n$). The number of 4‑inch screws is given as $22$.

steps.title: Set up total and simplify
steps.content: The total number of screws is the sum: $5n + n + 22$. This equals the daily total of $100$, so $$5n + n + 22 = 100.$$ Combine like terms: $5n + n = 6n$, giving $$6n + 22 = 100.$$ That matches choice D — D is correct.
